questions.subject: Paper-I · General English
questions.stem: Rearrange: P: Open-pit mining is used when coal seams are near the surface. Q: The topsoil and overburden are removed first. R: The coal is then extracted using heavy machinery. S: After mining, the land is reclaimed for other uses.

questions.subject: Paper-I · General English
questions.stem: Rearrange: is / of / coal / formation / a / process / slow
options: Coal formation is a slow process
A slow process is formation of coal
Formation of coal is a slow process
Coal formation is a slow process
Coal is a slow process of formation
questions.solution: Coal formation is a slow process

questions.stem: True stress vs engineering stress:
options: True: σ_t = σ_e(1+ε_e). Engineering: based on original area
questions.solution: True strain: ε_t = ln(1+ε_e). Beyond necking: true stress continues increasing.

questions.subject: Paper-II · Professional Knowledge

questions.subject: Paper-II · Professional Knowledge
questions.stem: A mild steel column of diameter 30mm and length 1.5m is pinned at both ends. E = 200000.0 MPa. The Euler buckling load (kN) is approximately:
questions.solution: P_cr = π²EI/L²; I = πd⁴/64 = 39761 mm⁴; P_cr = 34.88 kN

questions.stem: The involute profile of gear teeth ensures:
options: Constant velocity ratio even with slight center distance variation
questions.solution: Involute: constant angular velocity ratio regardless of center distance (within limits).

questions.stem: In a constant-volume (isochoric) process the work done by a closed system is:
questions.solution: W = ∫p dV = 0 when volume is constant, so all heat changes internal energy.

questions.stem: The condenser in a refrigeration system rejects heat equal to:
questions.solution: Q_h = Q_l + W_c = Refrigerating effect + Compressor work.
